===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\Proje‡Æo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\@types\qrcode\build\qrcode.d.ts" =====  
import * as QRCodeLib from "../index";

declare global {
    namespace QRCode {
        const create: typeof QRCodeLib.create;
        const toCanvas: typeof QRCodeLib.toCanvas;
        const toDataURL: typeof QRCodeLib.toDataURL;
        const toString: typeof QRCodeLib.toString;
    }
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\Proje‡Æo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\@types\qrcode\build\qrcode.tosjis.d.ts" =====  
import toSJISFunc = require("../helper/to-sjis");

declare global {
    namespace QRCode {
        const toSJIS: typeof toSJISFunc;
    }
}
